education.degree: Master of Technology., Computer Science Engineering Fictional

experience.description: Designed enterprise AI architectures and end-to-end AI pipelines covering ingestion, training, inference, monitoring, and retraining. Built production NLP and Generative AI solutions using Python, FastAPI, Transformers, and RAG. Integrated AI services with enterprise APIs and cloud platforms. Implemented MLOps with MLflow, Kubeflow, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, monitoring, governance, and drift detection. Led a team of 15 AI engineers and mentored teams on AI architecture and MLOps best practices.
Led NLP modernization projects, automated ML pipelines using Airflow, deployed scalable AI APIs, and implemented MLflow-based experiment tracking.
Developed predictive ML models, deep learning solutions, recommendation systems, and optimized model inference performance.
